channel.title: Matheus Lemos - Engenheiro de Dados
channel.description: Recent content on Matheus Lemos - Engenheiro de Dados

item.title: Midlevel Data Engineer
item.description:
Designed, deployed and maintained private-cloud data infrastructure to support analytics and ML teams:

  • Built multi-user JupyterHub environments for data scientists, enabling secure, isolated workspaces and self-service notebooks.
  • Provisioned and operated on-premises Apache Spark clusters for large-scale data processing and ETL workflows.
  • Deployed S3-compatible object storage using MinIO and integrated it with compute clusters for reliable, scalable data lakes.
  • Implemented Delta Lake to provide ACID transactions and reliable data pipelines.
  • Automated deployments and operational tasks with Docker-based containerization and infrastructure-as-code patterns; supported monitoring, backups, and access control for production systems.

item.title: Midlevel Data Engineer
item.description: Designed and maintained private cloud Spark and Jupyterhub deployments.

item.title: Midlevel Data Engineer
item.description: Designed and maintained private cloud Spark and Jupyterhub deployments.

item.title: Senior Data Engineer
item.description: Designed and maintained data pipelines for a variety of origins, including databases, files and third party APIs, using the Databricks platform.

item.title: Senior Data Engineer
item.description: Designed and maintained data pipelines processing over 10 TB per day using Spark and Airflow.
